title: Antigravity Skill Score v1
description: Quality score record for a single Antigravity skill. Scores are informational only and never block skill usage.

skill_id.description: Skill folder name — matches the 'name' frontmatter field.

risk.description: Risk classification as declared in frontmatter.

scores.description: Scoring dimensions. All values are in the range [0, 100].

metadata.description: Metadata completeness score (weight: 30%). Evaluates required and optional frontmatter fields.

documentation.description: Documentation quality score (weight: 40%). Evaluates section coverage, code examples, and content depth.

security.description: Security posture score (weight: 30%). Reduced by detected dangerous command patterns.

label.description: Human-readable quality label derived from total score. excellent ≥85, good ≥65, needs_improvement ≥45, critical <45.

flags.description: List of security and quality flags detected in this skill.

message.description: Human-readable description of the detected pattern.

line.description: Line number (1-indexed) in the skill body where the pattern was found.

matched_text.description: The matched text fragment from the pattern.
